Poker Hand #HD6666666666: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:36:00
Table 'Rush&Cash1' 6-Max Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain2 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain3 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain4 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 5: Hero ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($10.00 in chips)
Villain3: posts small blind $0.05
Hero: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Qs Jh]
Villain4: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain5: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain1: folds
Villain2: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain3: folds
Hero: calls $0.20
*** FLOP *** [Qh 5c 2d]
Hero: checks
Villain2: bets $0.25
Hero: folds
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.65 | Rake $0.03
Board [Qh 5c 2d]
Seat 2: Villain2 (button) collected ($0.62)
Seat 5: Hero (big blind) folded on the Flop
